name: Laser Battery
special: Ignores 1 point of shield armor. Can fire twice per round at -1 to hit on the second shot.

name: Plasma Cannon
special: On a natural 6 on any damage die, the target catches fire—deal 1 additional damage at the start of their next turn.

name: Ion Disruptor
special: Target's shields are reduced by 2 until the end of their next turn. Low damage, but devastating against shield-reliant ships.

name: Gauss Rifle Array
special: Armor-piercing: reduces target's hull armor by 1 for the attack. Effective against heavily armored targets.

name: Mass Driver Cannon
special: Slow reload—can only fire every other round. On a hit, the target is pushed back 2" and loses their next movement action.

name: Railgun Spinal Mount
special: Forward arc only. Penetrating shot: if this attack destroys a ship, it continues and deals 1d6 to the next ship in line.

name: Seeker Missile Pod
special: Guided: re-roll one missed attack die. Limited ammo: 3 volleys per game.

name: Heavy Torpedo Launcher
special: Slow: must spend one turn targeting before firing. Can target ships behind cover. Limited: 2 salvos per game.

name: Micro-Missile Swarm
special: Fires a swarm: make 4 separate attacks, each hitting on a 4+. Ideal for overwhelming point defenses. Limited: 4 volleys.

name: Void Lance
special: Tears through dimensional shielding: ignores all shield values. Chance of spatial anomaly—on a critical hit, the target ship must pass a sensors check or be displaced 3" randomly.

name: Phase Displacer
special: After firing, the attacking ship phases out—it cannot be targeted until its next activation. Requires experimental drive.

name: Resonance Beam
special: Harmonic cascade: if the target already has a Resonance debuff, this attack deals double damage. Chorus Collective ships can apply this debuff with Resonance Link.

name: Bio-Spore Cannon
special: On a hit, the target ship gains a Spore token. At the start of each subsequent round, deal 1 damage for each Spore token (max 3). Tokens cleared by spending one action.

name: Siege Macro-Cannon
special: Bombardment: can target planetary installations and stationary objectives. -2 to hit against mobile targets smaller than Destroyer class.

name: Dominion Annihilator Lance
special: Superpowered: cannot be fired two turns in a row. On a critical hit (all 6s), the target ship is instantly crippled regardless of hull points.

name: Point Defense System
special: Defensive: automatically intercepts one incoming missile attack per round before it resolves, dealing 1d4 to the missile. Does not use an action to fire when used defensively.

name: Flak Burst Battery
special: Area denial: makes 2 attacks, each hitting on 3+. Exceptional against small fast ships—bonus die against Interceptor and Frigate class targets.

name: EMP Projector
special: Non-lethal: deals no hull damage. On a hit, the target ship's shields go offline for 2 rounds and it loses one movement action next turn. Very effective support weapon.

name: Gravitic Projector
special: Tidal force: on a hit, the target is pulled or pushed up to 4" in any direction. Can be used to push enemies into obstacles or into range of allied ships.

name: Scatter Laser
special: Wide beam: hits all ships (friend or foe) within a 3" cone. Each hit triggers a separate 1d4 damage roll. Use with care in close formations.

name: Heavy Plasma Blaster
special: Overcharge available: spend 2 crew to roll an extra damage die. Overheating: if overcharged twice in a row, take 1 hull damage from the heat sink overflow.

name: Nova-class Nuclear Torpedo
special: Blast radius 4": all ships within range of the detonation take 2d6 splash damage. Single use per game. Prohibited in civilized space—opponents may object to its use in narrative campaigns.

name: Rapid-Fire Chain Gun
special: Suppressive: make 3 attack rolls. Each hit deals 1d6 damage. Target ship must pass an agility check after taking any hits or lose their next movement.

name: Harmonic Lore Cannon
special: Ancient technology: on a critical hit, deals maximum damage automatically. Once per game, the attack may be boosted to ignore all defenses for one round.
